vocab.meaning: thay đổi để bắt kịp xu hướng/thời đại
vocab.example: Most social media platforms constantly move with the times by adding short-form video features to stay relevant.
The new update is a double-edged sword; while it looks sleeker, it’s much harder to find the settings menu.
Before the recent server upgrade, the website used to load at a snail's pace, which was incredibly frustrating.

vocab.meaning: những tính năng phụ trợ hào nhoáng (nhưng không quá cần thiết)
vocab.example: The latest version of the app has all the bells and whistles, but I personally prefer the old, simpler interface.

vocab.meaning: trở lại vạch xuất phát/làm lại từ đầu
vocab.example: After a disastrous redesign that users hated, the developers had to go back to square one and re-evaluate the layout.

vocab.meaning: có cả thế giới trong tầm tay
vocab.example: With the integration of global news feeds, these websites truly put the world at my fingertips.

vocab.meaning: rõ ràng, dễ hiểu (như pha lê)
vocab.example: They’ve updated the user agreement to make the data privacy terms clear as crystal for the average user.

vocab.meaning: một sự tuột dốc (một hành động dẫn đến kết quả xấu hơn)
vocab.example: I feel that adding more and more ads is a slippery slope that will eventually drive all the loyal users away.

vocab.meaning: phần thiết yếu/nguồn sống/tính năng cốt lõi
vocab.example: Search functionality is the bread and butter of this site, so I’m glad they improved the search speed recently.

vocab.meaning: tự bơi hay là chìm (thời điểm quyết định sự thành bại)
vocab.example: With so much competition, websites must innovate or it's a case of sink or swim in the digital market.
